problem id: e928acf8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11100110 -> 00111110
  01011101 -> 11101101
  11000001 -> 00000100
  01100001 -> 00001110
  00110010 -> 10010011
  01010000 -> 10000101
  01011000 -> 11000101
  10111111 -> 11110011
  10110001 -> 10000011
  00000010 -> 00010000

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 10001111
